   - \( g(t) \) increases from 9000 to 11000.
   - \( f(t) \) is constant at 10000.
   - The intersection occurs when \( g(t) = 10000 \).
   - \( g(t) = 10000 \) at \( t = 90 \) minutes.

Therefore, the other time the airplanes have the same height is about 90 minutes after noon.
